results.title: Retirement wealth across Europe: Which countries have the wealthiest over-65s?
results.description: Wealth in retirement varies dramatically across Europe, shaping living standards well beyond what pension income alone can provide. In some countries, older households hold more than 30 times as much wealth as those in others, highlighting how housing, pensions and family support can shape...
